# Generated Files

The directory `lib/src/rust/` contains files generated by
`flutter_rust_bridge_codegen 2.11.1`. Do not edit these files by hand.

To regenerate:

```sh
cd <workspace-root>
./sdks/dart/build_dart.sh
```

## What gets generated

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `lib/src/rust/frb_generated.dart` | Async Dart bridge (main entry point) |
| `lib/src/rust/frb_generated.io.dart` | Native platform loader for `dart:ffi` |

## Rust source

The Rust entry point is `crates/frf-ffi/src/lib.rs`. Functions annotated with
`#[flutter_rust_bridge::frb(sync)]` or `#[uniffi::export]` are exposed to Dart.
CRDT bytes cross the boundary as `Uint8List` — the Loro engine is fully
encapsulated in Rust.
